This field is checked if the patient had urinary incontinence prior to the inpatient stay or change in medical or
treatment regimen within the past 14 days. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M1020_PRI_DGN_ICD M1020 (M0230) Primary Diagnosis ICD Code This field lists the primary diagnosis (ICD-9). CHAR 7 x
M1020_PRI_DGN_SEV M1020 (M0230) Primary Diagnosis Severity This field lists the severity of the primary diagnosis. 00 = Asymptomatic, no treatment needed at this time
01
